zh.lifeSummary: 當Heinrich Langenmantel von Sparren II於1274年出生在德國貝也藍德可萊斯 奧斯包格時，他的父親Reichsritter Hartmann Langenmantel von Sparren I23歲，母親Elisabeth Launginger24歲。他於1300年與Anna Lopp在德國貝也奧斯包格奧斯包格結婚。他們至少是2個女兒的父母。他於1324年在德國貝也奧斯包格奧斯包格被列為stadtpfleger  (city caregiver, per googletranslater)。他去世於1368年享年94歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Heinrich Langenmantel von Sparren II于1274年出生在德国貝也藍德可萊斯 奧斯包格时，他的父亲Reichsritter Hartmann Langenmantel von Sparren I23岁，母亲Elisabeth Launginger24岁。他于1300年与Anna Lopp在德国貝也奧斯包格奧斯包格结婚。他们至少是2个女儿的父母。他于1324年在德国貝也奧斯包格奧斯包格被列为stadtpfleger  (city caregiver, per googletranslater)。他去世于1368年享年94岁。

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Sparren
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Perrin
meanings: French and English: from the Old French and Middle English personal name Perrin, a pet form of Old French Perre, a variant of Pierre , French form of Peter . Compare Perine , Perrine , and Prine .

History: Henri Perrin from Louargat in Côtes-d'Armor, Brittany (France), married Jeanne Merrin in Montreal, QC, in 1661. — This surname is listed in the (US) National Huguenot Society's register of qualified Huguenot ancestors (along with its variants or altered forms Perrine and Pareyn) and also in the similar register of the Huguenot Society of America. One of the Huguenot ancestors was Daniel Perrin (1642–1719), nicknamed The Huguenot, who arrived in New York in 1665, aboard the Philip, and settled first in NJ and later on Staten Island. Among his descendants the surname is common in the altered forms Perrine, Perine and Prine. The Staten Island community of Huguenot is named after Daniel Perrin and other Huguenots who settled in the area during the late 17th century.

nameMeanings.name: Heinrich
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Henry
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

en.lifeSummary: When Heinrich Langenmantel von Sparren II was born in 1274, in Augsburg, Bavaria, Germany, his father, Reichsritter Hartmann Langenmantel von Sparren I, was 23 and his mother, Elisabeth Launginger, was 24. He married Anna Lopp in 1300, in Augsburg, Augsburg, Bavaria, Germany. They were the parents of at least 2 daughters. In 1324, at the age of 50, his occupation is listed as stadtpfleger  (city caregiver, per googletranslater) in Augsburg, Augsburg, Bavaria, Germany. He died in 1368, at the age of 94.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Heinrich Langenmantel von Sparren II est né en 1274, à Landkreis Augsburg, Bayern, Allemagne, son père, Reichsritter Hartmann Langenmantel von Sparren I, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Elisabeth Launginger, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Anna Lopp en 1300, à Augsburg, Augsburg, Bayern, Allemagne. Ils ont eu au moins 2 filles. En 1324, à l’âge de 50 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est stadtpfleger  (city caregiver, per googletranslater) à Augsburg, Augsburg, Bayern, Allemagne. Il est décédé en 1368, à l’âge de 94 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Heinrich Langenmantel von Sparren II 1274 in Landkreis Augsburg, Bayern, Deutschland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Reichsritter Hartmann Langenmantel von Sparren I 23 und seine Mutter Elisabeth Launginger 24. Er hat 1300 in Augsburg, Augsburg, Bayern, Deutschland Anna Lopp geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Töchter. 1324, als er 50 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als stadtpfleger  (city caregiver, per googletranslater) in Augsburg, Augsburg, Bayern, Deutschland aufgeführt. Er starb 1368 im Alter von 94 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Heinrich Langenmantel von Sparren II è nato il nel 1274 nel Landkreis Augsburg, Bayern, Germania, il suo padre, Reichsritter Hartmann Langenmantel von Sparren I, aveva 23 anni e il suo madre, Elisabeth Launginger, aveva 24 anni. Lui sposato Anna Lopp nel 1300, nel Augsburg, Augsburg, Bayern, Germania. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figlie. Nel 1324, all'età di 50 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come stadtpfleger  (city caregiver, per googletranslater) nel Augsburg, Augsburg, Bayern, Germania. Morì nel 1368, all'età di 94 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Heinrich Langenmantel von Sparren IIが1274年にドイツバイエルンランドクレイス アウグスブルグで生まれた時，父Reichsritter Hartmann Langenmantel von Sparren Iは23歳，母Elisabeth Laungingerは24歳であった。1300年にドイツバイエルンアウグスブルグアウグスブルグでAnna Loppと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の娘の親であった。1324年，50歳の時，ドイツバイエルンアウグスブルグアウグスブルグでの職業はstadtpfleger  (city caregiver, per googletranslater)と記録されている。彼は1368年に94歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Heinrich Langenmantel von Sparren II(이)가 1274년 독일 베이른 랜드크레이스 오그스버그에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Reichsritter Hartmann Langenmantel von Sparren I(은)는 23세였고, 그의 어머니 Elisabeth Launginger(은)는 24세였다. 그는 1300년 독일 베이른 오그스버그 오그스버그에서 Anna Lopp(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 1324년, 50세의 나이로 그의 직업은 독일 베이른 오그스버그 오그스버그에서 stadtpfleger  (city caregiver, per googletranslater)이었다. 그는 1368년 94세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Heinrich Langenmantel von Sparren II nasceu em 1274, em Landkreis Augsburg, Bayern, Alemanha, seu pai, Reichsritter Hartmann Langenmantel von Sparren I, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Elisabeth Launginger, tinha 24 anos. Ele casou-se com Anna Lopp em 1300, em Augsburg, Augsburg, Bayern, Alemanha. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhas. Em 1324, com 50 anos, sua profissão aparece como stadtpfleger  (city caregiver, per googletranslater) em Augsburg, Augsburg, Bayern, Alemanha. Ele faleceu em 1368, com 94 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Heinrich Langenmantel von Sparren II родился в 1274 г. в местности ландкрис аугсбург, беиирн, Германия, его отцу по имени Reichsritter Hartmann Langenmantel von Sparren I было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Elisabeth Launginger, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Anna Lopp в 1300 г. в местности аугсбург, аугсбург, беиирн, Германия. У них было по крайней мере 2 дочери. В 1324 году, в возрасте 50 лет,  он работал по профессии stadtpfleger  (city caregiver, per googletranslater) в местности аугсбург, аугсбург, беиирн, Германия. Он умер в 1368 г. в возрасте 94 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Heinrich Langenmantel von Sparren II nació en 1274, en Landkreis Augsburg, Bayern, Alemania, su papá, Reichsritter Hartmann Langenmantel von Sparren I, tenía 23 años y su mamá, Elisabeth Launginger, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Anna Lopp en 1300, en Augsburg, Augsburg, Bayern, Alemania. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijas. En 1324, a la edad de 50 años, su ocupación registrada era stadtpfleger  (city caregiver, per googletranslater) en Augsburg, Augsburg, Bayern, Alemania. Murió en 1368, a la edad de 94 años.
